name: Italian Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, heat the sunflower oil over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped celery and shallots. Cook for 5 minutes or until the vegetables are tender.
3. Stir in the cooked brown rice, tarragon, dill, salt, soy sauce, alfalfa sprouts, cashews, and cider vinegar.
4. Mix well to combine all ingredients.
5. Transfer the mixture to a serving bowl.
6. Serve at room temperature.
